description: A department chair needs to initiate the contract renewal process for a non-tenured faculty member.

nodes.task_description: Identify the faculty member whose contract is up for renewal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the faculty member's record and confirms their contract end date.

nodes.task_description: Generate the standard contract renewal packet in the HR system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates the required forms and documents.

nodes.task_description: Route the packet to the department chair for review and recommendation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent initiates the approval workflow in the HR system.
